tools.name: search_models
tools.description: Search the pricing catalog with provider, workload, context, and price filters.

tools.name: compare_models
tools.description: Compare pricing, context, and sourced benchmarks for model IDs.

tools.name: calculate_cost
tools.description: Estimate cost from model pricing and token volumes.

tools.name: find_cheapest
tools.description: Find cheapest models by combined listed input plus output token price.

tools.name: find_best_value
tools.description: Rank models by available benchmark signal per listed token price.

tools.name: provider_summary
tools.description: Summarize model count, prices, benchmarks, and changes for a provider.

tools.name: pricing_history
tools.description: Return historical pricing snapshots for a model ID.

tools.name: benchmark_lookup
tools.description: Find sourced benchmark rows by model, provider, or benchmark ID.

tools.name: latest_changes
tools.description: Return recent model launches, removals, and pricing changes.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Search AI Pricing Hub news items.

tools.name: recommend_model
tools.description: Recommend models for a workload using price, context, and benchmark evidence.
